guidance: FY27 EV battery-swap expansion across four corridors: NCR, Delhi-Mumbai, Kandla/Mundra ports, Mumbai-Pune.
Continued solar/wind IPP capacity additions from the 486MWp pipeline.
Rights issue to fund EV network build-out and renewable growth.
insights: EIM EV arm signed MoU with Drivn to deploy ~1,000 electric heavy trucks over two years.
FY26 revenue Rs543cr; Q4 consol PAT Rs12.6cr; EBITDA margin improved to ~24%.
Renewable IPP portfolio 486.3MWp across 113 sites (228.9MWp operational); Q4 generation surged.
EV/battery-swap unit (EIM) still loss-making, dragging consolidated profit; rights issue underway.
concall.orderExecution: Business is IPP asset-ownership plus EV/battery-swapping rather than EPC, so there is no classic order book; growth is via capacity and station roll-out.
concall.source: Q4/FY26 concall & business update (board 29-Apr-2026, screener shows Apr-2026 transcript); scanx.trade, trendlyne, powerpeakdigest, TipRanks

notes: Registry-level identity only; a detail JSON has not been added yet (model + manual approach).
